name: Universal OS tool versus UI routing
objective: Choose deterministic tool execution for code and quantitative tasks instead of unnecessary UI control.

steps.expect: Analysis, compute, code, and script options route to tool mode.
The sandbox returns structured stdout, stderr, parsed results, and artifacts.
Network and filesystem use remain policy-gated.
The mode decision and tool receipt are recorded for option-policy training.

expectations: The agent does not click through a UI for tasks better solved by code.
Tool execution remains sandboxed and auditable.
Mode decisions become supervised examples for the option-policy model.
